headline: Woman's 'Girl Math' Convinced Her That Returning An Item She Never Bought Is 'Free Money'
summary: She tried to return a shirt from a store she'd never visited. Security was called. She was 'confused.'
fullBody: Amanda GirlMath found a shirt in her closet. She didn't remember buying it. 'Free money,' she thought. She took it to the mall for a refund. 'I don't have a receipt,' Amanda said. 'Because I didn't buy it here,' the cashier said. Security escorted her out. 'It's girl math,' Amanda explained. The police did not accept girl math. Amanda is now 'taking a break from returns.'
